description: An artisan sweet tropical guava gummy made like a tiny gourmet dessert — tender, juicy, and finished with the kind of sweet-sour sparkle that keeps you reaching for the next piece. It blends CBD to keep things calm and balanced, CBC to round out the full-plant entourage effect, and CBG to support daytime focus and clarity. A flavorful sativa option for customers who want their cannabis wrapped in something genuinely craveable.
